fields.description: Short one-line product tagline for pricing cards and meta
fields.name: tagline

fields.description: Rich text description — converted from Webflow HTML via html-to-pte
A valid web, email, phone, or relative link.
fields.name: href
fields.title: Link

fields.name: description

fields.description: Additional product images — lifestyle shots, angles, etc.
fields.name: gallery

fields.description: Other device variants shown as selectable options on this product page (e.g., Holo Active Slim). Each referenced device must also reference this device in its own variants array.
fields.name: variants
fields.title: Product Variants

fields.description: Display-only string, e.g. "from $64.95/month". Not used for checkout.
fields.name: monthlyPriceDisplay

fields.description: Display-only string, e.g. "779.95". Not used for checkout.
fields.name: annualPriceDisplay

fields.description: One-time device fee dollar amount — DISPLAY ONLY. Use stripePriceIdDevice for checkout.
fields.name: devicePrice
fields.title: Device Price (Display)

fields.description: Sale/promotional device price — DISPLAY ONLY.
fields.name: reducedDevicePrice
fields.title: Reduced Device Price (Display)

fields.description: Number of free bonus months added to annual subscriptions (e.g. 2 = "14 months for the price of 12"). Set to 0 or leave empty for no bonus.
fields.name: annualBonusMonths
fields.title: Annual Plan — Bonus Months

validation.message: Should start with "price_" — paste Price ID from Stripe dashboard, not the payment link URL

fields.description: Paste the Stripe Price ID (starts with price_). Find it in Stripe Dashboard → Products → [Device Name] → Prices.
fields.name: stripePriceIdMonthly
fields.title: Stripe Price ID — Monthly

validation.message: Should start with "price_" — paste Price ID from Stripe dashboard, not the payment link URL

fields.description: Paste the Stripe Price ID (starts with price_). Find it in Stripe Dashboard → Products → [Device Name] → Prices.
fields.name: stripePriceIdYearly
fields.title: Stripe Price ID — Yearly

validation.message: Should start with "price_" — paste Price ID from Stripe dashboard, not the payment link URL

fields.description: Paste the Stripe Price ID (starts with price_). Find it in Stripe Dashboard → Products → [Device Name] → Prices.
fields.name: stripePriceIdDevice
fields.title: Stripe Price ID — Device (One-time)

fields.description: Spec #1=Height, Spec #2=Width, Spec #3=Weight, Spec #4=Connectivity, Spec #5=Emergency Mode. Webflow stored these as 5 unnamed columns — labels must be added during Phase 3 import.
fields.name: specs
fields.title: Product Specs

fields.description: Small label above the features heading. Defaults to "Built For Real Life".
fields.name: featuresSectionEyebrow
fields.title: Features Section — Eyebrow Label

fields.description: Main heading for the features section. Defaults to "Why [device name]?".
fields.name: featuresSectionHeading
fields.title: Features Section — Heading

fields.description: Features shown in the scroll-snapping features section. Each feature has a title, description, and image.
Image displayed in the right panel when this feature is active
fields.name: image
fields.title: Feature Image

fields.description: Optional MP4/WebM video displayed instead of the image when present. Keep under 500KB for performance.
fields.name: video
fields.title: Feature Video

fields.name: features
fields.title: Device Features

fields.description: Webflow stored as 3 pairs of How it Works Image/Content columns.
fields.name: howItWorksSteps

fields.description: Webflow stored as 5 Accessory Name + 5 Accessory Image columns.
fields.name: accessories

fields.description: Upload an MP4 directly — Sanity will host it. Up to 25 seconds, compressed for web.
fields.name: ambientVideo
fields.title: Ambient Loop Video

fields.description: Vimeo URL for product explainer video lightbox
fields.name: videoUrl
fields.title: Product Video URL

fields.description: Subtitle shown on the pricing card component
fields.name: pricingCardSubhead

fields.description: Display sort order for pricing cards on the compare/products page (1 = first)
fields.name: pricingCardOrder

fields.description: e.g. "from $54.95/month" — text displayed on pricing card
fields.name: pricingCardSubscription
fields.title: Pricing Card Subscription Label

fields.description: Bullet points shown on pricing card. Webflow stored as 5 separate Benefit columns. HTML tags stripped during import.
fields.name: pricingCardBenefits

fields.description: Enable to show the Caregiver Connected section on this product page
fields.name: hasCaregiverApp
fields.title: Has Caregiver App Section

fields.description: Main heading for the Caregiver Connected section. Defaults to "Caregiver Connected".
fields.name: caregiverAppHeading
fields.title: Caregiver App — Section Heading

fields.description: Introductory paragraph(s) for the Caregiver Connected section. Separate paragraphs with a blank line.
fields.name: caregiverAppDescription
fields.title: Caregiver App — Description

fields.description: Full-bleed background image for the left panel of the Caregiver Connected section
fields.name: caregiverAppBackgroundImage
fields.title: Caregiver App — Background Image

fields.description: App screenshot displayed in the foreground of the left panel — shows the caregiver app UI
fields.name: caregiverAppForegroundImage
fields.title: Caregiver App — Foreground Image (App Screenshot)

fields.description: Expandable feature items shown below the CTA in the Caregiver Connected section.
fields.name: caregiverAppFeatures
fields.title: Caregiver App — Features Accordion

fields.description: Legal disclaimer text about fall detection limitations
fields.name: fallAlertDisclaimer
fields.title: Fall Detection Disclaimer

fields.description: e.g. "Ships within 3-5 business days"
fields.name: shippingTimeline

fields.description: Uncheck to hide device from storefront without deleting it
fields.name: isActive
fields.title: Active (Currently Sold)

fields.description: Enable on ONE device to use its hero image in the homepage feature diagram. Only one device should have this enabled at a time.
fields.name: isFeaturedHomepage
fields.title: Featured on Homepage

fields.description: Webflow CMS Item ID — used during Phase 3 import to prevent duplicates. Can be removed post-migration.
fields.name: webflowId
fields.title: Webflow Item ID

fields.description: One-liner shown on the add-on toggle card (e.g. "2-year device warranty")
fields.name: shortDescription

fields.description: Expanded description shown when the user opens the add-on details
fields.name: description
fields.title: Full Description

fields.description: Price shown on the card when customer selects the Monthly plan. Display only — use Stripe fields for checkout.
fields.name: priceMonthly
fields.title: Monthly Price (Display)

fields.description: Price shown on the card when customer selects the Annual plan. Display only — use Stripe fields for checkout.
fields.name: priceAnnual
fields.title: Annual Price (Display)

list.title: Recurring (follows the customer's plan — monthly or annual)

fields.description: Recurring add-ons use the Monthly Stripe Price ID when the customer picks a monthly plan, and the Annual Stripe Price ID when they pick annual.
fields.name: billingInterval
fields.title: Billing Type

fields.description: Used when customer is on the Monthly plan. Starts with price_.
fields.name: stripePriceIdMonthly
fields.title: Stripe Price ID — Monthly

fields.description: Used when customer is on the Annual plan. Starts with price_.
fields.name: stripePriceIdAnnual
fields.title: Stripe Price ID — Annual

fields.description: If checked, this add-on is shown on every product page.
fields.name: appliesToAllDevices
fields.title: Applies to All Devices

fields.description: Select which devices this add-on applies to. Ignored if "Applies to All Devices" is checked.
fields.name: applicableDevices

fields.description: Uncheck to hide this add-on without deleting it.
fields.name: isActive
fields.title: Active

fields.description: Lower numbers appear first.
fields.name: sortOrder

fields.description: Controls blog post chronological ordering
fields.name: publishedAt

fields.description: Author name (plain text). Webflow used e.g. "David Krawczyk".
fields.name: author

fields.description: Blog category tag, e.g. "Technology & Devices". Plain text in Webflow.
fields.name: category

validation.message: Keep under 160 characters for optimal SEO display

fields.description: Used as blog list summary AND as the page meta description. Corresponds to Webflow "Meta Description / Summary" column.
fields.name: excerpt
fields.title: Excerpt / Meta Description

fields.description: Thumbnail image used in blog listing pages and social sharing
fields.name: mainImage

fields.description: Full-width banner image displayed at top of blog detail page. Separate from mainImage.
fields.name: heroImage

fields.description: Portable Text body — converted from Webflow HTML via html-to-pte. Webflow column: "Main text".
A valid web, email, phone, or relative link.
fields.name: href
fields.title: Link

fields.name: body

fields.description: Pin this post to featured placement on the blog index. Webflow column: "Featured Blog".
fields.name: isFeatured
fields.title: Featured Post

fields.description: Optional. Overrides the post title in <title> meta tag. Leave blank to use post title.
fields.name: seoTitle
fields.title: SEO Title Override

fields.description: Webflow CMS Item ID — used during Phase 3 import to prevent duplicates. Remove post-migration.
fields.name: webflowId
fields.title: Webflow Item ID

fields.description: Which pages should display this FAQ. One document can appear on multiple pages.
fields.name: pages

fields.description: Lower numbers appear first within a page context
fields.name: sortOrder

fields.description: Optional. e.g. "Daughter of Holo Alert user". Not in Webflow export — add editorially.
fields.name: role
fields.title: Role / Relationship

fields.description: Customer location, e.g. "Saskatchewan, Canada". From Webflow export.
fields.name: location

fields.description: 1 to 5 stars
fields.name: rating

fields.description: Device slug this review is for, e.g. "holo-pro", "holo-mini", "holo-active". Stored as string to avoid broken refs during import.
fields.name: productSlug
fields.title: Product

fields.description: Only approved testimonials are displayed on the site. Default true for migrated data, false for new submissions.
fields.name: isApproved
fields.title: Approved

fields.description: Webflow CMS Item ID — used during Phase 3 import to prevent duplicates. Remove post-migration.
fields.name: webflowId
fields.title: Webflow Item ID

fields.description: Internal title for editors — e.g. "Spring 2026 Sale Banner"
fields.name: title

fields.description: The promotional message displayed to visitors
fields.name: body
fields.title: Promotional Copy

fields.description: Master switch. Set false to immediately hide without deleting. Date range is also checked.
fields.name: isActive
fields.title: Active

fields.description: Promotion starts displaying at this time (UTC). Leave blank for no start restriction.
fields.name: startDate

fields.description: Promotion stops displaying after this time (UTC). Leave blank for no end restriction.
fields.name: endDate

fields.description: e.g. "Shop Now", "Claim Offer"
fields.name: ctaText
fields.title: CTA Button Label

fields.description: Where the CTA button links to
fields.name: ctaUrl
fields.title: CTA Destination URL

fields.description: Which pages show this promotion. Empty = no pages (but keep isActive false too).
fields.name: targetPages

fields.description: Used in <title> tags and Open Graph. e.g. "Holo Alert"
fields.name: siteTitle

fields.description: Default meta description for pages without a specific description
fields.name: siteDescription

fields.description: Click-to-call formatted, e.g. "1-800-xxx-xxxx". Used in header, footer, and tel: links.
fields.name: phoneNumber

fields.description: Full mailing address for structured data / schema.org LocalBusiness. Include province and postal code.
fields.name: address

fields.description: Use "Section Title (H2)" for numbered section headers, "Sub-heading (H3)" for sub-sections, Normal for body text, Bullet for lists, and "Legal Disclaimer" for uppercase liability/warranty clauses.
fields.name: content
fields.title: Page Content

fields.description: Main device image displayed in the homepage hero banner
fields.name: heroImage
fields.title: Hero Device Image

fields.description: Lifestyle image shown in the bottom-left card of the hero section
fields.name: heroImageSlot1

fields.description: Lifestyle image shown in the top-right card of the hero section
fields.name: heroImageSlot2
fields.title: Hero — Image Slot 2 (Top-Right Card)

fields.description: Small image used in the customer social-proof badge in the hero section
fields.name: heroImageSlot3
fields.title: Hero — Image Slot 3 (Customer Badge Card)

fields.description: The 3-step cards with photo backgrounds on the homepage
Destination when user clicks "Explore" (e.g. /devices)
fields.name: href

fields.name: howItWorksSteps
fields.title: How It Works — Steps

fields.description: Family/lifestyle image shown in the "Why Choose" grid (top-right cell)
fields.name: whyChooseImage

fields.description: Certification logos and descriptions (TMA, ESA, UL, etc.)
Enable to display the logo at 2× scale (useful for small logos)
fields.name: scaleUp

fields.name: certifications

fields.description: Logos displayed in the scrolling trust bar marquee below the hero
